551.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray four rak'ahs whose beauty and length cannot be described, then four more whose beauty and length cannot be described, then three. She said: "O Messenger of Allah, do you sleep before praying Witr?" He said: "My eyes sleep but my heart does not."
551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ shalat empat rakaat yang keindahan dan panjangnya tidak dapat digambarkan, kemudian empat lagi yang keindahan dan panjangnya tidak dapat digambarkan, kemudian tiga rakaat. Ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau tidur sebelum shalat Witir?" Beliau bersabda: "Mataku tidur tetapi hatiku tidak."

552.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ had asked her to distribute some coins among the poor, but she was too preoccupied caring for him during his illness. When he recovered and asked about them, she said: "By Allah, your illness distracted me." He called for them and held them in his hand, then said: "What would a prophet of Allah think if he were to meet Allah while these were still with him?"
552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ telah memintanya untuk membagikan beberapa koin kepada orang-orang miskin, tetapi ia terlalu sibuk merawat beliau selama sakitnya. Ketika beliau sembuh dan menanyakannya, ia berkata: "Demi Allah, sakitmu menyibukkanku." Beliau memintanya dan menggenggamnya di tangan, lalu bersabda: "Apa yang akan dipikirkan seorang nabi Allah jika ia bertemu Allah sementara benda-benda ini masih bersamanya?"

553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: "O Aisha, be gentle, for when Allah intends good for a household, He guides them to the door of gentleness."
553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Wahai Aisyah, bersikaplah lembut, karena ketika Allah menginginkan kebaikan bagi suatu rumah tangga, Dia menunjukkan mereka ke pintu kelembutan."

554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The 'ajwah dates of al-'Aliyah, eaten first thing in the morning on an empty stomach, are a cure for every magic or poison."
554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kurma 'ajwah dari al-'Aliyah, yang dimakan pertama kali di pagi hari dalam keadaan perut kosong, adalah obat untuk setiap sihir atau racun."

555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a roasted lizard was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ but he did not eat it and he did not forbid it. She said: "O Messenger of Allah, shall we not feed it to the poor?" He said: "Do not feed them what you yourselves do not eat."
555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seekor biawak panggang dibawakan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tetapi beliau tidak memakannya dan tidak melarangnya. Ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, tidakkah kita berikan kepada orang-orang miskin?" Beliau bersabda: "Jangan beri mereka apa yang kalian sendiri tidak makan."

556.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "The 'ajwah dates of al-'Aliyah are a remedy — or an antidote — when eaten first thing in the morning."
556.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Kurma 'ajwah dari al-'Aliyah adalah obat — atau penawar — ketika dimakan pertama kali di pagi hari."

557.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "An army from my ummah will march against this House, against a man of the Quraysh who has taken refuge in the sanctuary. When they reach al-Bayda', they will be swallowed up." Aisha asked: "But how will Allah raise them on the Day of Resurrection when they went with different intentions?" He said: "They were gathered together by the road. Among them are the believer, the traveler, and the one coerced. They will perish together but will be raised with different intentions."
557.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Sebuah pasukan dari umatku akan berbaris menuju Baitullah, melawan seorang laki-laki dari Quraisy yang berlindung di tanah haram. Ketika mereka mencapai al-Baida', mereka akan ditelan bumi." Aisyah bertanya: "Tetapi bagaimana Allah akan membangkitkan mereka pada Hari Kiamat padahal mereka pergi dengan niat yang berbeda?" Beliau bersabda: "Mereka dikumpulkan oleh jalan. Di antara mereka ada orang beriman, musafir, dan yang dipaksa. Mereka binasa bersama tetapi akan dibangkitkan dengan niat yang berbeda."

558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Breaking the bone of a deceased person is like breaking the bone of a living person."
558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Mematahkan tulang orang yang sudah meninggal seperti mematahkan tulang orang yang masih hidup."

559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "A house without dates is like a house without food."
559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Rumah yang tidak ada kurmanya seperti rumah yang tidak ada makanannya."

560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ forbade steeping unripe dates — meaning those that are still in the early yellow stage.
560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang merendam kurma yang belum matang — yaitu yang masih dalam tahap kuning awal.

561.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding a man who swore an oath not to give charity to a poor person. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said three times: "He swears he will not do good! He swears he will not do good! He swears he will not do good!" When the man came and offered to give everything — all the fruit or whatever had been placed — the Prophet ﷺ accepted what had been offered.
561.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai seorang laki-laki yang bersumpah tidak akan bersedekah kepada orang miskin. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tiga kali: "Dia bersumpah tidak akan berbuat kebaikan! Dia bersumpah tidak akan berbuat kebaikan! Dia bersumpah tidak akan berbuat kebaikan!" Ketika laki-laki itu datang dan menawarkan untuk memberikan segalanya — semua buah atau apa yang telah diletakkan — Nabi ﷺ menerima apa yang telah ditawarkan.

562.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ swore not to visit his wives for a month. When twenty-nine days had passed, he came to enter. She said: "Did you not swear a month?" He said: "The month is twenty-nine days."
562.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersumpah tidak akan mengunjungi istri-istrinya selama sebulan. Ketika dua puluh sembilan hari berlalu, beliau datang untuk masuk. Ia berkata: "Bukankah engkau bersumpah sebulan?" Beliau bersabda: "Bulan itu dua puluh sembilan hari."

563.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade selling fruits until their ripeness became apparent and they were safe from blight.
563.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang menjual buah-buahan hingga kematangannya tampak jelas dan aman dari kerusakan.

564.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she used to pray the forenoon prayer and say: "I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray except four rak'ahs."
564.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia biasa shalat Dhuha dan berkata: "Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat kecuali empat rakaat."

565.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I asked the Prophet ﷺ about looking around during prayer, and he said: 'It is a snatching away that Satan steals from the prayer of the servant.'"
565.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang menoleh selama shalat, dan beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah pencurian yang dilakukan setan dari shalat seorang hamba.'"

566.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was in the mosque and asked a young girl to hand him the prayer mat, intending to spread it out and pray on it. She said she was menstruating. He said: "Your menstruation is not in your hand."
566.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berada di masjid dan meminta seorang gadis kecil untuk memberikan tikar shalat, bermaksud menggelarnya dan shalat di atasnya. Gadis itu mengatakan ia sedang haid. Beliau bersabda: "Haidmu bukan di tanganmu."

567.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would seek out fasting on Mondays and Thursdays."
567.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ selalu mengutamakan puasa pada hari Senin dan Kamis."

568.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked what the Prophet ﷺ used to do in his house, she said: "What any of you does — he used to mend his sandals and patch his garment."
568.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya apa yang Nabi ﷺ biasa lakukan di rumahnya, ia berkata: "Apa yang dilakukan salah seorang dari kalian — beliau biasa memperbaiki sandalnya dan menambal pakaiannya."

569.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ applied perfume after stoning the Jamrah and before performing the tawaf of ifadah. Salim said: "The Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ is more worthy of being followed than the saying of Umar."
569.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memakai wewangian setelah melempar jumrah dan sebelum melakukan tawaf ifadah. Salim berkata: "Sunnah Rasulullah ﷺ lebih layak untuk diikuti daripada perkataan Umar."

570.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding who would lead the people: "Allah and the Muslims refuse" — except that it be Abu Bakr. And so it was Abu Bakr.
570.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai siapa yang akan memimpin orang-orang: "Allah dan kaum Muslimin menolak" — kecuali Abu Bakar. Dan itulah Abu Bakar.

571.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that some people complained to the Prophet ﷺ of disturbing thoughts they experienced, saying: "O Messenger of Allah, we find something in our hearts that one of us would rather fall from the sky than speak of." The Prophet ﷺ said: "That is pure faith."
571.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa beberapa orang mengadu kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang pikiran-pikiran yang mengganggu mereka, berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, kami menemukan sesuatu di hati kami yang salah satu dari kami lebih memilih jatuh dari langit daripada mengucapkannya." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Itulah iman yang murni."

572.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to 'Uthman: "Do you believe in what we believe in?" He said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah." He said: "Then do as we do."
572.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada 'Utsman: "Apakah kamu beriman dengan apa yang kami imani?" Ia berkata: "Ya, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau bersabda: "Maka lakukan sebagaimana kami lakukan."

573.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would be intimate with his family at the beginning of the night, then sleep without touching water. When he awoke in the last part of the night, he would return to his family and then bathe."
573.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ berhubungan dengan keluarganya di awal malam, kemudian tidur tanpa menyentuh air. Ketika beliau bangun di penghujung malam, beliau kembali kepada keluarganya lalu mandi."

574.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, all your wives have a kunya except me." He said: "Take the kunya Umm 'Abdullah, from your son 'Abdullah."
574.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, semua istrimu memiliki kunya kecuali aku." Beliau bersabda: "Ambillah kunya Ummu Abdullah, dari anakmu Abdullah."

575.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would fast until we said he would never break his fast, and he would break his fast until we said he would never fast. He never completed fasting an entire month except Ramadan, and I never saw him fasting more in any month than in Sha'ban."
575.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ berpuasa hingga kami berkata beliau tidak akan pernah berbuka, dan beliau berbuka hingga kami berkata beliau tidak akan pernah berpuasa. Beliau tidak pernah menyempurnakan puasa sebulan penuh kecuali Ramadan, dan aku tidak pernah melihat beliau berpuasa lebih banyak dalam bulan mana pun daripada di bulan Sya'ban."

576.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "May Allah forgive Abu Abd al-Rahman. He did not lie, but he forgot or made an error. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by a Jewish woman who was being wept over, and he said: 'They are weeping over her, yet she is being punished in her grave.'"
576.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Semoga Allah mengampuni Abu Abdurrahman. Ia tidak berdusta, tetapi ia lupa atau keliru. Rasulullah ﷺ melewati seorang wanita Yahudi yang ditangisi, dan beliau bersabda: 'Mereka menangisinya, padahal ia sedang diazab di kuburnya.'"

577.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed Witr at every part of the night — the beginning, the middle and the end — and his Witr settled in the last part before dawn."
577.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ shalat Witir di setiap bagian malam — awal, pertengahan, dan akhir — dan Witir beliau menetap di penghujung malam menjelang fajar."

578.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ performed Hajj as ifrad (Hajj only).
578.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melaksanakan haji secara ifrad (haji saja).

579.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I applied perfume to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in Mina before he performed the visit to the House."
579.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ di Mina sebelum beliau melakukan kunjungan ke Baitullah."

580.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "A man may do the deeds of the people of Paradise while he is written in the Book as one of the people of Hellfire. When he is close to death, he turns and does the deeds of the people of Hellfire and dies, and enters the Fire. And a man may do the deeds of the people of Hellfire while he is written in the Book as one of the people of Paradise. When he is close to death, he turns and does the deeds of the people of Paradise and dies, and enters it."
580.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Seorang laki-laki mungkin melakukan amalan penduduk surga sementara ia tertulis dalam Kitab sebagai salah satu penduduk neraka. Ketika ia mendekati kematian, ia berbalik dan melakukan amalan penduduk neraka lalu meninggal, dan masuk neraka. Dan seorang laki-laki mungkin melakukan amalan penduduk neraka sementara ia tertulis dalam Kitab sebagai salah satu penduduk surga. Ketika ia mendekati kematian, ia berbalik dan melakukan amalan penduduk surga lalu meninggal, dan masuk ke dalamnya."

581.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) through multiple chains that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Hajj as ifrad (Hajj only).
581.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui berbagai sanad bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakan haji secara ifrad (haji saja).

582.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when people crowded around the Messenger of Allah ﷺ until he stood on her threshold, he slipped his cloak out of their hands and leaped inside, then said: "O Allah, curse them." Aisha said: "O Messenger of Allah, they are ruined!" He said: "No, by Allah, O daughter of Abu Bakr. I made a condition with my Lord, one He will not break. I said: I am only a man — I get as distressed as people get. So whichever believer I spoke harshly against, make it an expiation for him."
582.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika orang-orang berkerumun di sekitar Rasulullah ﷺ hingga beliau berdiri di ambang pintunya, beliau melepaskan jubahnya dari tangan mereka dan melompat masuk, lalu bersabda: "Ya Allah, laknatlah mereka." Aisyah berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, mereka celaka!" Beliau bersabda: "Tidak, demi Allah, wahai putri Abu Bakar. Aku telah membuat syarat dengan Rabbku, syarat yang tidak akan Dia ingkari. Aku berkata: Aku hanyalah seorang manusia — aku bisa sepedas yang bisa dirasakan manusia. Maka orang beriman mana pun yang aku perlakukan kasar, jadikanlah itu sebagai kafarat baginya."

583.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "There was not a single day except that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would make his rounds among all of us, one wife after another, coming close and being affectionate without intercourse, until he reached the one whose day it was and he would spend the night with her."
583.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Tidak ada satu hari pun kecuali Rasulullah ﷺ berkeliling di antara kami semua, satu istri demi satu, mendekat dan menunjukkan kasih sayang tanpa hubungan intim, hingga sampai kepada yang hari itu adalah gilirannya dan beliau bermalam bersamanya."

584.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O son of my sister, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: 'O Aisha, do not count, lest Allah count against you.'"
584.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai putra saudariku, Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadaku: 'Wahai Aisyah, jangan menghitung-hitung, agar Allah tidak menghitung-hitungmu.'"

585.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O son of my sister, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'By the One in Whose hand is my soul, a man may do the deeds of the people of Hellfire for a long time while he is written with Allah as one of the people of Paradise, and a man may do the deeds of the people of Paradise for a long time while he is written with Allah as one of the people of Hellfire.'"
585.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai putra saudariku, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, seorang laki-laki mungkin melakukan amalan penduduk neraka dalam waktu lama sementara ia tertulis di sisi Allah sebagai salah satu penduduk surga, dan seorang laki-laki mungkin melakukan amalan penduduk surga dalam waktu lama sementara ia tertulis di sisi Allah sebagai salah satu penduduk neraka.'"

586.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Prophet ﷺ died, there was nothing on my shelf that a living creature with a liver could eat, except a small amount of barley. I ate from it for a long time and it did not diminish, until I measured it and it ran out. I wish I had not measured it. By Allah, the mattress he lay on was of leather stuffed with palm fibers."
586.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Nabi ﷺ wafat, tidak ada sesuatu pun di rakku yang bisa dimakan makhluk bernyawa, kecuali sedikit gandum. Aku makan darinya dalam waktu lama dan tidak berkurang, sampai aku menakarnya dan habis. Seandainya aku tidak menakarnya. Demi Allah, kasur tempat beliau berbaring terbuat dari kulit yang diisi dengan serabut kelapa."

587.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever is questioned closely in the reckoning will not be forgiven." She said: "I asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, where is Allah's saying: "He will be reckoned with an easy reckoning"?' He said: 'That is the presentation of deeds.'"
587.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa diperiksa secara detail dalam hisab maka ia tidak akan diampuni." Ia berkata: "Aku bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, di mana firman Allah: "Dia akan dihisab dengan hisab yang mudah"?' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah pemaparan amal.'"

588.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to have sweet water fetched for him from the wells of al-Suqya.
588.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa meminta diambilkan air tawar dari sumur-sumur al-Suqya.

589.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "When one of you goes to relieve himself, let him clean himself with three stones, for that is sufficient."
589.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ketika salah seorang di antara kalian pergi untuk memenuhi hajatnya, hendaklah ia bersuci dengan tiga batu, karena itu sudah cukup."

590.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever is questioned closely in the reckoning will be punished."
590.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa diperiksa secara detail dalam hisab, ia akan diazab."

591.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to her: "Do not count, lest it be counted against you."
591.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Jangan menghitung-hitung, agar tidak dihitung-hitungkan atasmu."

592.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was ill, I placed my hand on his chest and said: 'Remove the suffering, O Lord of mankind. You are the Physician, You are the Healer.' And the Messenger of Allah ﷺ kept saying: 'Join me with the Most Exalted Companion, join me with the Most Exalted Companion.'"
592.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ sakit, aku meletakkan tanganku di dadanya dan berkata: 'Hilangkanlah penderitaan, wahai Rabb manusia. Engkau adalah Tabib, Engkau adalah Penyembuh.' Dan Rasulullah ﷺ terus berkata: 'Pertemukanlah aku dengan Rafiq al-A'la, pertemukanlah aku dengan Rafiq al-A'la.'"

593.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, if sleep overcame him or he was in pain and could not pray at night, would pray twelve rak'ahs during the day.
593.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, jika kantuk menguasainya atau beliau merasa sakit dan tidak bisa shalat di malam hari, beliau shalat dua belas rakaat di siang hari.

594.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he visited a sick person, would say: "Remove the suffering, O Lord of mankind. Heal, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing — a healing that leaves no sickness behind."
594.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika mengunjungi orang sakit, beliau berdoa: "Hilangkanlah penderitaan, wahai Rabb manusia. Sembuhkanlah, karena Engkau adalah Penyembuh. Tidak ada kesembuhan kecuali kesembuhan dari-Mu — kesembuhan yang tidak meninggalkan penyakit."

595.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ could not pray at night, he would pray twelve rak'ahs during the day. She also said: I never saw him stand in prayer a whole night until morning, nor fast a complete month without break except Ramadan. And the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do a deed consistently."
595.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Jika Rasulullah ﷺ tidak bisa shalat di malam hari, beliau shalat dua belas rakaat di siang hari. Ia juga berkata: Aku tidak pernah melihat beliau berdiri shalat semalam penuh hingga subuh, tidak pernah berpuasa sebulan penuh tanpa henti kecuali Ramadan. Dan Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan suatu amalan secara konsisten."

596.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a need with his family, he would fulfil it and then return without touching water."
596.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ memiliki keperluan dengan keluarganya, beliau memenuhinya kemudian kembali tanpa menyentuh air."

597.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to sleep at the beginning of the night and rise at the end of it."
597.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa tidur di awal malam dan bangun di penghujungnya."

598.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked why she kept a spear in her house, she said: "We kill geckos with it. The Prophet of Allah ﷺ told us that when Ibrahim (peace be upon him) was thrown into the fire, every creature tried to extinguish it except the gecko, which used to blow on it. So the Prophet ﷺ commanded that it be killed."
598.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya mengapa ia menyimpan tombak di rumahnya, ia berkata: "Kami membunuh cicak dengan itu. Nabi Allah ﷺ memberitahu kami bahwa ketika Ibrahim (alaihi salam) dilempar ke dalam api, setiap makhluk berusaha memadamkannya kecuali cicak, yang biasa meniupnya. Maka Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dibunuh."

599.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see the glistening of perfume in the parting of his hair while he was saying the talbiyah."
599.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku dapat melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambutnya sementara beliau mengucapkan talbiyah."

600.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see the glistening of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
600.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku dapat melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ."
